response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile engineer with deep web and full-stack experience, but he does not meet the role's mandatory requirements. His professional C++ exposure amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. He shows no SQL Server or Oracle experience (MySQL/MongoDB only) and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background — RIDE Capital was a TypeScript/Node fintech role, not capital markets C++ work. The core stack mismatch is too large to bridge for a mid-senior consulting engagement.
strengths: Nearly 20 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active open-source contributions
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL and MongoDB
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain background
Strong general engineering and low-latency systems experience
